top_signals.title: Easyjet attracts takeover interest from US private credit firm
top_signals.summary: Budget airline carrier Easyjet has drawn takeover interest from private credit firm Castlelake, which could make the airline the latest UK-listed company to be snatched off the stock market. Castlelake said it was in the “early stages of considering a possible offer” for Easyjet on Friday, but was yet to approach the company’s board. The [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Thiel moves family to Milei’s libertarian Argentina
top_signals.summary: Palantir founder intends to spend several months in Buenos Aires initially
